title: Week 11 + a washi tape giveaway
excerpt: Though my desk is still somewhat organized and clean, you would not actually know it. This week included a whirlwind trip to NYC. Cindy and I were there for less than 36 hours, but we managed to do quite a…
body:
Though my desk is still somewhat organized and clean, you would not actually know it.

This week included a whirlwind trip to NYC. Cindy and I were there for less than 36 hours, but we managed to do quite a bit. Including the very important task of having Cindy have her first Ace Hotel lamb burger as well as her first Shake Shack experience.

You can see all my Project Life posts here. And now for the really exciting stuff. *GIVEAWAY* I have been talking about (and obsessing over) washi tape for years now, and you have a chance to win a $20 gift certificate from Freckled Fawn.

To be entered for your chance to win, leave a comment on this post telling me which washi tape roll is your favorite. You can also leave a bonus comment/entry if you tweet about this giveaway. Our wonderful friends at Freckled Fawn are offering 15% discount (expires March 31) for readers using the code: tangerine. Contest is closed. *UPDATED* March 26: I really enjoyed reading all your comments telling me something good and also finding out which washi tape is your favorite. Looks like there are tons of fans out there loving every single roll. The winner of the $20 gift certificate to Freckled Fawnis:

Michelle LaPoint Rydell

said...

Those tapes are all adorable, but my fave is the blue one with the clouds and hearts! Your project life is awesome as always Amy!!!

March 23, 2012 12:16 PM
